summary: Executed S1-05 validation across source regressions, production UI flows (professional/admin), and lint/build checks. Source regressions passed, production UI still serves legacy dashboard bundle without new S1-05 card testids, and full lint currently fails while build:web succeeds.

ui_bugs.issue: On official URL, data-testid='next-appointment-card' and S1-05 state selectors are absent; page still renders legacy card/metric UI.
On official URL, data-testid='global-next-appointment-card' is absent; global card behavior could not be validated in production.

integration_issues.issue: Production appears to serve older bundle; S1-05 selectors and card components are not present despite source regression pass.
Repeated 403 network responses still occur during professional dashboard loading/sync in production.

issues: Desktop calendar prev/next still moves by 7 days per click in current source and production UI.

action_items: Deploy the latest frontend bundle containing S1-05 components/hooks to official URL, then retest professional and admin next-appointment cards in production.
Investigate and fix repeated 403 responses seen during professional dashboard sync on production.
Fix lint blocker in /app/src/hooks/useTeam.ts dependency array (JSON.stringify expression) and rerun full lint.
Re-run production checks for create/cancel/complete/reschedule refresh behavior specifically against new S1-05 cards after deploy.
critical_code_review_comments: S1-05 source implementation is consistent and covered by passing targeted regressions (36/36).
Current production mismatch indicates release/deployment lag rather than source regression.
Full lint is not green due to react-hooks/use-memo error in useTeam dependency array.

success_rate.frontend: 60% (core login/navigation interactions passed; S1-05 UI contract not verifiable on production bundle)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Use credentials from /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Validate on https://cut-sync.vercel.app after new deploy: confirm presence of next-appointment-card/global-next-appointment-card testids and state selectors, then execute mutation flows (create/cancel/complete/reschedule) and verify refresh behavior.
rca of the issue: Primary RCA: production bundle lag. Reproduction: login as professional/admin on official URL; S1-05 card testids are absent and legacy dashboard blocks direct validation of new stateful card behavior. Secondary RCA: lint blocker is in useTeam hook dependency array using JSON.stringify expression, which violates stricter react-hooks rule.
test_credentials: Read from /app/memory/test_credentials.md and used professional/admin credentials provided.
